initiatives.title: AI Development System Evolution
initiatives.summary: Plan and govern controlled improvements to the AI Development System.

initiatives.title: Centralized AI Project Control Plane
initiatives.summary: Unify scattered ctl commands into one validated command layer and prepare a local Web Control Center over the same backend while preserving AI_PROJECT/state as source of truth, AI_PROJECT/events as audit history, and AI_PROJECT/generated as derived output.

epics.title: Documentation Rails
epics.summary: Create practical documentation and registry control for Project Control Gateway usage.

epics.title: Skills Layer
epics.summary: Document and govern the skills and plugin guidance layer for AI Development System work.

epics.title: Prompt Context Retrieval Layer
epics.summary: Add a controlled, auditable context retrieval layer that builds deterministic Context Packs from registered documentation and project-control state, integrates them into Codex prompt packages, and later supports optional vector search backends.

epics.title: Task Identity and Execution Graph
epics.summary: Define and implement a stable task identity model, epic-scoped human refs, backward-compatible legacy task IDs, cross-epic dependencies, and an executable task queue for parallel epic execution.

epics.title: Implement unified aictl and local Control Center foundation
epics.summary: Introduce a unified CLI facade and shared command/service layer for project control operations, then add a read-only local web dashboard as a thin UI over the same command registry. Core rule: Command -> Validate -> Append Event -> Mutate State -> Regenerate Views -> Return Result.

epics.title: Control Plane Workflow Automation
epics.summary: Add high-level workflow automation, owner-facing UI actions, task/evolution creation helpers, grouped task import, review/close helpers, and documentation cleanup for the completed local control plane.

epics.title: Supervised Batch Pipeline Runner
epics.summary: Human Owner selects a task queue and automation policy; Pipeline advances executable tasks through guarded gates until the first blocker.

epics.title: Bug Fixes
epics.summary: Controlled bug fixes for project-control workflows, execution context, and Web Control Center regressions.

epics.title: Phase-based Pipeline Execution Model
epics.summary: Redesign pipeline execution into explicit queue, prepare, execute, collect-report, verify, review and close phases with deterministic gates, clear outcomes and safe automation boundaries.
